name: Boomsense Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Boomsense Technology Co.,Ltd. provides wireless broadband access solutions in China. The company provides distributed, dual carrier, enterprise, outdoor, and small cell systems; multiservice distributed access system solutions, repeater series products, micro power distribution systems, and base station amplifiers; and passive devices and point of interfaces. It also offers wireless access point controllers, access points, wireless bridges, and wireless base stations; indoor antennas, base station antennas, camouflage antennas, and camouflage shells; electricity security products; and gateway terminals. Boomsense Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Beijing, China.
